title: Withholding or denying of permits; causes
doc_html:
§288.  Withholding or denying of permits; causes

All causes enumerated in this Chapter as sufficient cause for the suspension or revocation of a permit shall also be sufficient cause for the commissioner to withhold or deny a permit.  

Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
doc_text:
§288.  Withholding or denying of permits; causes
All causes enumerated in this Chapter as sufficient cause for the suspension or revocation of a permit shall also be sufficient cause for the commissioner to withhold or deny a permit.
Acts 1987, No. 696, §1.
